sentences.arabic: تَلْعَبُ المُوسِيقَى دَوْرًا مِحْوَرِيًّا فِي التَّعْبِيرِ عَنِ الوِجْدَانِ وَالرُّوحِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Muzika igra ključnu ulogu u izražavanju arapskog bića i duše.
sentences.translationEn: Music plays a pivotal role in expressing the Arab soul and sentiment.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ العُودُ "سُلْطَانَ الآلَاتِ" فِي الشَّرْقِ الأَوْسَطِ لِمَا لَهُ مِنْ مَكَانَةٍ خَاصَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Oud se smatra 'kraljem instrumenata' na Bliskom istoku zbog svog posebnog statusa.
sentences.translationEn: The Oud is considered the 'Sultan of Instruments' in the Middle East due to its special status.

sentences.arabic: أَلْحَانُهُ العَمِيقَةُ تَبْعَثُ فِي النَّفْسِ مَشَاعِرَ الحَنِينِ وَالشَّجَنِ وَالفَرَحِ.
sentences.translation: Njegove duboke melodije bude u duši osjećaje nostalgije, sjetu i radost.
sentences.translationEn: Its deep melodies evoke feelings of nostalgia, melancholy, and joy within the self.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمَهُ كِبَارُ المُلَحِّنِينَ لِبِنَاءِ مَقَامَاتٍ مُوسِيقِيَّةٍ غَنِيَّةٍ بِالتَّفَاصِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Veliki kompozitori su ga koristili za izgradnju muzičkih makama bogatih detaljima.
sentences.translationEn: Great composers have used it to build musical scales (Maqamat) rich in detail.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاسْتِمَاعَ إِلَى فِرْقَةِ "التَّخْتِ" يُعْتَبَرُ رِحْلَةً عَبْرَ التَّارِيخِ وَالعَوَاطِفِ الإِنْسَانِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Slušanje ansambla 'Takht' smatra se putovanjem kroz historiju i ljudske emocije.
sentences.translationEn: Listening to a 'Takht' ensemble is considered a journey through history and human emotions.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَزَالُ المُوسِيقَى الحَدِيثَةُ تَسْتَمِدُّ إِلْهَامَهَا مِنْ هَذِهِ القَوَاعِدِ الكِلَاسِيكِيَّةِ الرَّصِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Moderna muzika i dalje crpi inspiraciju iz ovih čvrstih klasičnih temelja.
sentences.translationEn: Modern music still derives its inspiration from these solid classical foundations.

sentences.arabic: فَهِيَ تَجْسِرُ الفَجْوَةَ بَيْنَ الثَّقَافَاتِ المُخْتَلِفَةِ مِنْ خِلَالِ لُغَةٍ عَالَمِيَّةٍ مُوَحَّدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ona premošćuje jaz između različitih kultura putem jedinstvenog univerzalnog jezika.
sentences.translationEn: It bridges the gap between different cultures through a unified universal language.
